items.title: US hits dozens of trading partners with new wave of tariffs
items.summary: Imposed citing forced labour concerns, the levies replace a temporary global duty brought in after the US Supreme Court struck down tariffs in February.

items.title: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
items.summary: The price of Brent crude rose more than 6% on Thursday as the war in the Middle East continues to escalate.

items.title: Indonesian babies were trafficked to Singapore. What happens to them now?
items.summary: At least 12 babies have been trafficked from Indonesia to Singapore, but what will happen to them remains unclear.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 瑞士男攀富士山送醫不治 日本99歲老婦獲救
items.summary: 日本當局今（24）日表示，1名58歲的瑞士男子在攀登富士山時失去意識後死亡，同日救援人員成功救出了1名受傷的99歲的日本老婦。  根據《法新社》報導，日本警方指出，瑞士男子...…

items.title: 美國連13晚空襲伊朗 德黑蘭稱襲擊巴林和約旦美軍基地
items.summary: 美國和伊朗不斷交火，衝突持續升溫。美國中央司令部稱，美軍於美東時間23日晚上9時完成對伊朗的空襲，這是美國連續13晚空襲伊朗。伊朗軍方今（24）日表示，為報復美國近期的攻擊，將...…

items.title: 比韓劇還曲折！SK會長崔泰源「世紀離婚案」重審 須付前妻208億
items.summary: 南韓財閥SK集團會長崔泰源與前總統盧泰愚之女盧素英的「世紀離婚案」歷經近9年訴訟，法院今（24）日公布最新判決。韓媒《東亞日報》報導，南韓法院於台灣時間下午1時宣判，裁定65歲的...…
